C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM #503A. DOUGLAS SHAW, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. ROBERT BALIAN, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: BEN RODRIGO, PLAINTIFF. ALISON MADDEN SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR KENNETH TISGART. ALSO PRESENT WAS TIM KILLELEA ON BEHALF OF DEFT. ORIENTAL VASE AND FURNITURE AND DEFT. DINH VONG, DRIVER. INSURANCE ADJUSTER, GERALD LUBECK WAS ALSO PRESENT. BINH VUONG AND DINH VONG WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFT. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS DISMISSED AS OF 9/9/96. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TO JURY TRIAL ON 3/22/99. PRO TEM DOUGLAS SHAW RECOMMENDED SANCTIONS TO BE IMPOSED IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE BY 10:00 A.M. ON 3/22/99. (SEE REGISTER OF ACTION).
